程序包 edu.bupt.ta.storage

类 FileStorageUtil

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
public class FileStorageUtil extends Object
Centralised file-based persistence layer for the TA Recruitment System. All CSV read/write for users, jobs, and applications passes through this class. Provides path resolution from system properties, environment variables, or auto-detection; atomic writes via a temp-then-move pattern; single-process synchronisation via a static IO_LOCK; automatic bootstrap and seeding of empty CSV files; and optional mirroring to a secondary data directory.

CSV column positions are fixed and must be kept in sync whenever a field is added.

另请参阅:
  • UserService
  • JobService
  • ApplicationService

    说明
    void
    deleteApplications(List<String> applicationIds)
    Removes application rows whose IDs are in the given list from the applications CSV.

    Returns the resolved base data directory path.

    Returns a new FileStorageUtil instance.
    List<Application>

    Loads all applications from applications.csv.

    Loads all jobs from jobs.csv.

    Loads all users from ta_users.csv.
    String

    Returns the current timestamp formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".

    Saves all applications to applications.csv, replacing the entire file contents.
    void

    Saves all jobs to jobs.csv, replacing the entire file contents.
    void

    Saves all users to ta_users.csv, replacing the entire file contents.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • FileStorageUtil

      public FileStorageUtil()

  • 方法详细资料

    • getInstance

      public static FileStorageUtil getInstance()
      Returns a new FileStorageUtil instance. All public methods are static-accessible via the lock-free read path; this method exists for API compatibility.
      返回:
      a new FileStorageUtil instance

    • getBaseDir

      public Path getBaseDir()
      Returns the resolved base data directory path.
      返回:
      the absolute base directory path

    • loadUsers

      public List<User> loadUsers()
      Loads all users from ta_users.csv. Skips the header row and blank lines. Rows with fewer than 11 fields are skipped.
      返回:
      a list of all deserialised User objects

    • saveUsers

      public void saveUsers(List<User> users)
      Saves all users to ta_users.csv, replacing the entire file contents. Null field values are written as empty strings. The write is atomic.
      参数:
      users - the complete list of users to persist

    • loadJobs

      public List<Job> loadJobs()
      Loads all jobs from jobs.csv. Skips the header row and blank lines. For backward compatibility, rows with fewer than 12 fields are padded with empty strings up to 12 fields.
      返回:
      a list of all deserialised Job objects

    • saveJobs

      public void saveJobs(List<Job> jobs)
      Saves all jobs to jobs.csv, replacing the entire file contents. The write is atomic.
      参数:
      jobs - the complete list of jobs to persist

    • loadApplications

      public List<Application> loadApplications()
      Loads all applications from applications.csv. Skips the header row and blank lines. Rows with fewer than 6 fields are skipped.
      返回:
      a list of all deserialised Application objects

    • saveApplications

      public void saveApplications(List<Application> apps)
      Saves all applications to applications.csv, replacing the entire file contents. The write is atomic.
      参数:
      apps - the complete list of applications to persist

    • deleteApplications

      public void deleteApplications(List<String> applicationIds)
      Removes application rows whose IDs are in the given list from the applications CSV.
      参数:
      applicationIds - the IDs of applications to delete

    • nowText

      public String nowText()
      Returns the current timestamp formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".
      返回:
      formatted timestamp string
